## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between ColdIQ and GrowthX to explore potential AI SEO collaboration and content scaling strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [ColdIQ seeks to scale SEO efforts, particularly with AI-driven content creation](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a comprehensive strategy-first approach to content scaling, focusing on editorial content before programmatic](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [GrowthX's process involves an initial 8-week strategy sprint ($20-30k) followed by ongoing execution ($9-25k+/month)](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes sustainable growth over rapid, potentially risky content scaling](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)

## Topics

### ColdIQ's Business Model and Goals

  - [Multi-product company: agency (GTM systems), info products, and tool directory](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Primary revenue streams: outbound system setup, AI sales agency training, tool partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Main goal: Increase qualified website traffic across all products](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Current success: 85% of meetings booked from LinkedIn organic content](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Services

  - [Focus on building editorial engines for clients, prioritizing long-form content](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Team includes experienced editors and SEO experts (e.g., ex-TechCrunch, G2)](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Strategy sprint: 8-week process to create AI-ready artifacts and develop content roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Execution phase: Consistent content publishing based on strategy (15+ pieces/week for larger engagements)](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Custom platform for workflow management and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)

### AI SEO Strategies and Challenges

  - [GrowthX avoids rapid, large-scale programmatic content creation to prevent potential penalties](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [Emphasis on building topical authority through editorial content before exploring programmatic options](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [Careful approach to scaling: start small, monitor performance, then expand gradually](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
  - [Focus on continual content refreshment and enrichment to maintain growth](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)

### GrowthX vs. Other Solutions (e.g., AirOps)

  - [GrowthX evolved from using AirOps to developing their own platform](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [Offers more hands-on, managed service compared to pure software solutions](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [Custom workflow engine allows for faster adaptations and feature additions](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a follow-up 45-minute meeting for early next week](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [Kyle to send a scheduling link for the team to find a suitable time](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
  - [Deeper dive into GrowthX's platform, use cases, and customer examples in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/2o-vrn56HyycbSYQnaHasQtr3z8Kbm-e?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
